Environmental Protection.summary: Welch has consistently supported environmental legislation including clean energy investments and climate action.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with major climate provisions (Senate vote, August 2022)
Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act with clean energy funding (Senate vote, August 2021)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Welch supports higher taxes on wealthy individuals and corporations.
voted_for: Inflation Reduction Act with 15% corporate minimum tax (Senate vote, August 2022)
voted_against: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (House vote, December 2017)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Welch has consistently voted to protect and expand reproductive rights.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (House vote, September 2021)
Ensuring Access to Abortion Act (House vote, July 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Welch has supported LGBTQ+ rights throughout his congressional career.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)
Equality Act (House vote, February 2021)

Cannabis Policy.summary: Welch has supported cannabis reform and legalization efforts.
voted_for: MORE Act to federally decriminalize marijuana (House vote, April 2022)

Environmental Protection.summary: Sanders has been a leading advocate for aggressive climate action and environmental protection.

Green New Deal resolution as co-sponsor (February 2019)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Sanders has been a long-time advocate for progressive taxation and taxing the wealthy.

voted_against: Tax Cuts and Jobs Act (Senate vote, December 2017)

Criminal Justice Reform.summary: Sanders supports comprehensive criminal justice reform including sentencing reform.
voted_for: First Step Act (Senate vote, December 2018)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Sanders has consistently supported reproductive rights and access to abortion.
voted_for: Women's Health Protection Act (Senate vote, February 2022)
Ensuring Access to Abortion Act (Senate vote, July 2022)

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: Sanders has long supported LGBTQ+ rights and equality legislation.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act (Senate vote, November 2022)
Equality Act co-sponsor

Cannabis Policy.summary: Sanders has been a strong supporter of marijuana legalization at the federal level.
voted_for: Marijuana legalization advocacy and policy statements

Public School Funding.summary: Sanders has advocated for increased federal funding for public education.
voted_for: American Rescue Plan Act with education funding (Senate vote, March 2021)

Environmental Protection.summary: Balint has supported environmental protection and climate action since taking office in 2023.
voted_for: Lower Energy Costs Act amendments supporting clean energy (House votes, March 2023)
voted_against: Lower Energy Costs Act which would expand fossil fuel production (House vote, March 2023)

Progressive Taxation.summary: Balint supports progressive tax policies and closing loopholes for the wealthy.
voted_against: GOP tax cut package (House vote, January 2023)

Reproductive Health Rights.summary: Balint is a strong advocate for reproductive rights and abortion access.

LGBTQ+ Rights.summary: As an openly LGBTQ+ member of Congress, Balint strongly supports LGBTQ+ rights.
voted_for: Respect for Marriage Act implementation measures
voted_against: Parental Rights in Education bills restricting LGBTQ+ curriculum (House votes, 2023)

Police Accountability.summary: Balint has advocated for police accountability and reform measures.

Public School Funding.summary: Balint supports increased federal funding for public education.
voted_against: School choice bills redirecting public education funding (House votes, 2023-2024)
